summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a solid 1980 performance, highlighted by an especially tight second set and stellar Jerry Garcia vocals.
review: The reviewer describes the show as very nice and notes that the superb recording quality elevates the listening experience. The second set receives particular praise for its tight playing and Jerry's amazing voice, making it worth repeated spins.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it rates the show 4 stars and emphasizes both strong performance and excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer explicitly says the recording quality makes the show much better, noting clear and great sound throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as very tight and enjoyable; overall performance described as very nice.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice described as amazing and playing noted as very tight.
